title: Vuori | Suppliers | CommonShare
description: About (Vuori) Founded in 2015 by Joe Kudla and headquartered in Carlsbad and Encinitas, California, Vuori is a privately held company specializing in premium activewear and athleisure. The name "Vuori," Finnish for "mountain," reflects the brand's focus on garments that bridge performance and lifestyle.
